English: As a result of what the apostles were doing, sick people were carried out into the streets and placed on beds and mats so that at least Peter's shadow might fall on some of them as he passed by.
Nyoro: ego, baletaga nomu makute abarwaire, nibababyamya ha mikeka na ha mpinyo, Petero obwarahinguraho ekiiturukye kibasikirizeho, abamu.

English: and said in a loud voice, “Stand up straight on your feet!” The man jumped up and started walking around.
Nyoro: yagamba niraka erihango ati Imuka oyeme're nebigere byawe. Yagaruka yagenda.

English: After Jesus had gone indoors, his disciples asked him privately, “Why couldn't we drive the spirit out?”
Nyoro: uwe yayeme’ra. Kandi obuyatahireomu nju, abegeswabe bamukaguza omunsita ngu Itwe titusoboire kugubinga.

English: saying, “If you only knew today what is needed for peace! But now you cannot see it!

Nyoro: Yaija hali abegeswa, yabasanga bagwijagire, yagambira Petero ati Rundi timurukusobora okurora nanyowe akacu kamu?

Nyoro: Kandi kinu nukwo kugonza, tugenderege nkebiragirobye okubiri. Kinu nikyo kiragiro, nkokumwahulire okuruga karanakara, numwo mugenderemuga.

English: I don't do the good I want to do; instead, I do the evil that I do not want to do.

English: “King Agrippa! I consider myself fortunate that today I am to defend myself before you from all the things these Jews accuse me of,
Nyoro: Mpirirwe,omukama Agulipa, baitu ningenda okwetonganira omu maiso gawe hati obwebigambo byona ebinalegerwe Abayudaya:

English: And if a Christian woman is married to a man who is an unbeliever and he agrees to go on living with her, she must not divorce him.
Nyoro: kandi omukazi wena anyakuina omusaijawe atarukuikiriza, kandi ogu agonza okuikara nauwe, ataleka omusaijawe.

English: as though they were my laws!’
Nyoro: Nibegesa ebiragiro byabantu ongu nibyo byokukwata.

English: Jesus said to the man, “Come up here to the front.”

English: The time has come to destroy those who destroy the earth!”

English: In the same way you have people among you who follow the teaching of the Nicolaitans.
Nyoro: Nukwo naiwe oyina abarukukwata okwegesa kwa Banikolaiti.

English: But they were not able to answer him about this.
Nyoro: Kandi batasobole okugarukamu ebigambo ebi.

English: For, as the scripture says, “The earth and everything in it belong to the Lord.”

Nyoro: Nukwo, nka Sodomu na Gomora nembuga ezikaba zihe’raineho obuzayehaireyo omu ngeso zimu, hamu nabo omu busihani, nibakuratira Omubiri gundi, okuzatairweho okuba ekyokuro’raho, nizisalizibwa okubonabona okwomu’ro ogutahwaho.

English: The wisdom I proclaim is God's secret wisdom, which is hidden from human beings, but which he had already chosen for our glory even before the world was made.

Nyoro: nagamba ati Omusaija nikyo alirekera ise na nyina, atarane na mukaziwe; nabo babiri baliba mubiri gumu?

English: “The head of John the Baptist,” she answered.
Nyoro: Kandi yaturuka yagambira nyina ati Ndasaba ki? Yagamba ati Omutwe gwa yohana Omubatizi.

English: But if we live in the light—just as he is in the light—then we have fellowship with one another, and the blood of Jesus, his Son, purifies us from every sin.
Nyoro: baitu obutugendera omu musana nkauwe okwali omu musana, tuterana hamu itwenka naitwenka nesagama ya Yesu Omwanawe etwogyaho ebibi byona.

English: and I would heal them.’”
Nyoro: Nyowe mbakize.

English: And a human being is worth much more than a sheep! So then, our Law does allow us to help someone on the Sabbath.”
Nyoro: Omuntu takira muno entama? Nikyo kirungi okukora okurungi ha kiro ekya Sabiti.

English: The voice spoke to him again, “Do not consider anything unclean that God has declared clean.”
Nyoro: Kandi iraka lyamuizira, omurundi ogwakabiri liti, Ruhanga ebiyasemize otalibifora iwe ebyomuziro.

Nyoro: Kandi bakamusendekereza okumuhikya Asiya Sopetera owa Beroya mutabani wa Pulo; Nabasesalonika Alisitako na Sekundo; na Gayo owa Derebe, na Timoseo, Nabasiya Turiko na Tirofimo.

English: And when your witness Stephen was put to death, I myself was there, approving of his murder and taking care of the cloaks of his murderers.’

English: how right and true are your ways!

English: “Listen!” says Jesus. “I am coming soon! Happy are those who obey the prophetic words in this book!”
Nyoro: Kandi dora ninyija bwango. Ayina omugisa arukukwata ebigambo ebyokuragura ebyomu kitabu kinu.

English: With their shameless carousing they are like dirty spots in your fellowship meals. They take care only of themselves. They are like clouds carried along by the wind, but bringing no rain. They are like trees that bear no fruit, even in autumn, trees that have been pulled up by the roots and are completely dead.
Nyoro: Banu nigo mabale agaserekerwe omu bugenyi bwanyu obwokugonzangana obubalirana nainywe, abalisa betuma abarukwerisa bonka okutatina; ebicu ebitarumu amaizi nibitwarwa emiyaga, emiti yomutoigo etanyina byana eyafire kabiri, eyaihirwe nemihama:

English: They are filled with all kinds of wickedness, evil, greed, and vice; they are full of jealousy, murder, fighting, deceit, and malice. They gossip
Nyoro: baijulire kimu okutahiki'ra kwona, nobubi, nomukoijo, nokunoba; baijuire ihali, nobuisi, nokukungana, nebisuba nitima; abantu ababaza ebihwa, nabageya,

Nyoro: nukwo nabasaija bati obubarekereyo eki omukazi ekyazalirwa, bayaka hamu omu kwegomba kwabu, abasaija nabasaija nibakorangana ebitarukusemera, kandi nibahabwa omulibo bonka empera egi esemerire okusisa kwabu.

Nyoro: Omuntu obwaraba nabagambira ati Nimuko’ra ki kinu? Inywe mugambe ngu Mukama waitu naguse’ra; ahonaho araguga’ra kunu.

Nyoro: Tinibo abarukujuma ibara eyekitinisa erimwayetirwemu?

English: Uzziah was the father of Jotham. Jotham was the father of Ahaz. Ahaz was the father of Hezekiah.
Nyoro: Yoramu akazara Uziya; Uziya akazara Yosamu; Yosamu akazara Ahazi; Ahazi akazara Hezekiya;

English: Those whom God had already chosen he also set apart to become like his Son, so that the Son would be the first among many believers.
Nyoro: Baitu abo abayamanyire ira, nibo yayahuire ira, okusisanizibwa nomulingo Gwomwanawe, nukwo abe omuzigaijo omu bagenzibe abaingi:

English: Perhaps I can make the people of my own race jealous, and so be able to save some of them.
Nyoro: rundi obundibakwasa ihali obwekigambo kyona abomubiri gwange, rundi ndijuna abamu omubo.

English: The priests who serve in the Jewish place of worship have no right to eat any of the sacrifice on our altar.
Nyoro: Tunyina ekyoto abo abahereza ebyomu hema ekibatararagirwe okuliraho:

English: While I was working among you, I was paid by other churches. I was robbing them, so to speak, in order to help you.
Nyoro: Nkaiba ekanisa ezindi nimpabwa empera, empereze inywe:

English: But the invited guests paid no attention and went about their business: one went to his farm, another to his store,
Nyoro: baitu batakiteho mutima, nibegendera, omu omu makage, ondi omu buguzibwe:

English: But when the Holy Spirit comes upon you, you will be filled with power, and you will be witnesses for me in Jerusalem, in all of Judea and Samaria, and to the ends of the earth.”
Nyoro: Baitu mulihebwa amani Omwoyo Ogurukwera obwaliikamara okubaizira: nainywe muraikaraga bakaiso bange omu Yerusalemu, na Buyudaya bwona, nomu Samaliya nokuhikya empero zensi.

English: Love one another warmly as Christians, and be eager to show respect for one another.
Nyoro: Omu kugonzangana muganjane hamu: omu kitinisa munyumizangane nabene banyu;

English: Among them are Hymenaeus and Alexander, whom I have punished by handing them over to the power of Satan; this will teach them to stop their blasphemy.
Nyoro: omuli abo nibo Humenayo na Alegezanda: abanahaireyo hali Setani, nukwo begesebwe okutajuma.

English: The world was not good enough for them! They wandered like refugees in the deserts and hills, living in caves and holes in the ground.
Nyoro: (ensi abeterasemerire) nibahambara omu irungu, nensozi nobuingira, nomu biina biitaka.

English: After everyone had gone a long time without food, Paul stood before them and said, “You should have listened to me and not have sailed from Crete; then we would have avoided all this damage and loss.
Nyoro: Kandi obubaikaireho muno okutalya, nubwo Paulo yayemerire hagati yabu, nagamba ati Abasaija, kikabahiki'ra okuhu'ra nyowe, okutahanika amaberu okuruga Kerete, okutabona okusisikara kunu nokuferwa.

English: He knew very well that the Jewish authorities had handed Jesus over to him because they were jealous.
Nyoro: Baitu akamanya bamuhaireyo obwihali.

English: “You speak Greek, do you?” the commander asked.
Nyoro: Kandi Paulo obwakaba na'sana okutahibwaomu rukomero yagambira engabwa omu rulomero yagambira engabwa enkuru ati Nkugambire ekigambo? Yagamba ati Omanyire Oruyonani?

English: Before God, who gives life to all things, and before Christ Jesus, who firmly professed his faith before Pontius Pilate, I command you
Nyoro: Ninkuragira omu maiso ga Ruhanga arukwomeza ebintu byona, na Kristo Yesu ayayerangire okweranga okurungi omu maiso ga Pontio Pirato;

English: Then the Pharisees left and made plans to kill Jesus.
Nyoro: Baitu Abafalisayo baturuka nibamugambirana ensita okubaramuhwerekereza.

English: “Come and see,” answered Philip.
Nyoro: Nasaneri yamugambira ati Omu Nazalesi hasobora okurugamu ekintu ekirungi? Firipo yamugambira ati Ija orole.

English: But Paul shouted at the top of his voice, “Don't harm yourself! We are all here!”
Nyoro: Baitu Paulo yagambira haiguru niraka likoto, nagamba ati Otekora kubi: baitu itwena tuli hanu.

English: The police officers reported these words to the Roman officials; and when they heard that Paul and Silas were Roman citizens, they were afraid.
Nyoro: Kandi baserikale babagambira abacwi bemisango ebigambo ebi: batina obubahulire bali Barumi;

English: The world and everything in it that people desire is passing away; but those who do the will of God live forever.
Nyoro: Kandi ensi ehwaho nokwegomba kwayo: baitu ayakukora Ruhanga ebyagonza aikara ebiro nebiro.

English: They answered, “You were born and brought up in sin—and you are trying to teach us?” And they expelled him from the synagogue.
Nyoro: Bagarukamu nibamugambira ngu Iwe okazarwa mali omu bibi, kandi notwegesa itwe? Bamubingira aheru.

English: Let me tell you how hard I have worked for you and for the people in Laodicea and for all others who do not know me personally.
Nyoro: BAITU mbaire ningonza inywe okumanya okwekamba okuli kwingi okunyina habwanyu na habwabo abomu Laodikiya, na bona abatakabonaga amaiso ga

English: Whoever does what my Father in heaven wants is my brother, my sister, and my mother.”
Nyoro: baitu anyakukora wena isenyowe ali omu iguru ebyagonza, nuwe mugenzi wange, nuwe munyanya nyowe nuwe mau.

English: Some of the teachers of the Law spoke up, “A good answer, Teacher!”
Nyoro: Kandi abomu bahandiki abamu bagarukamu nibagamba ngu Omwegesa ogambire kurungi.

English: They tried to find out when the time would be and how it would come.
Nyoro: Nibase'ra ebiro okubiri rundi okubirukusisa, Omwoyo gwa Kristo ogukaba guli omulibo ebigwayolekere, obugwamanyisibwe ira okubonabona kwa Kristo nebyekitinisa ebirukuhondera.

English: The man went through the town, telling what Jesus had done for him.
Nyoro: Garukayo omuka yawe, otebeze okubiri ebikuru Ruhanga ebyakukolire. Kandi yagenda, yahikya omu rubuga rwona okubiri ebikuru Yesu ebiyamukolire.

English: to obey your orders and keep them faithfully until the Day when our Lord Jesus Christ will appear.
Nyoro: olinde ekiragiro hataloho kamogo, hatali ekyokuhanwa, okuhikya okwolekwa kwa Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo:

English: Who, then, is the liar? It is those who say that Jesus is not the Messiah. Such people are the Enemy of Christ—they reject both the Father and the Son.
Nyoro: Noha mubihi? Rundi ogu orukwehakana ngu Yesu tali Kristo? Ogu nuwe munyanzigwa wa Kristo, orukwehakana Isitwe Nomwana.

English: “You have a demon in you!” the crowd answered. “Who is trying to kill you?”
Nyoro: Abomukitebe bamugarukamu ngu Okwesirwe omuzimu noha ase’ra okukuita?

English: Jesus answered them, “Because those Galileans were killed in that way, do you think it proves that they were worse sinners than all other Galileans?
Nyoro: Yagarukamu nabagambira ati Nimutekereza ngu Abagaliraya abo bakaba bali basisi okukira Abagaliraya bona, baitu bakasalizibwa bati?

English: I am content with weaknesses, insults, hardships, persecutions, and difficulties for Christ's sake. For when I am weak, then I am strong.
Nyoro: Nukwo nsemerirwe omu byobugara, omu kukorwa kubi, omu kusega, omu kuhingwa, omu bujune, habwa ndimugara, nubwo ndi wamani.

English: And so I say to you: Ask, and you will receive; seek, and you will find; knock, and the door will be opened to you.
Nyoro: Kandi nimbagambira inywe nti Musabe mulihebwa; muse’re mulizora; mwerange mulikingu;rwaho.

English: Pilate went back out once more and said to the crowd, “Look, I will bring him out here to you to let you see that I cannot find any reason to condemn him.”
Nyoro: Pirato yagaruka naturuka aheru yabagambira ati Dora, ni’muturukya aheru namberemuli, mumanye ngu timboine musango haluwe.

English: and have a reputation for good deeds: a woman who brought up her children well, received strangers in her home, performed humble duties for other Christians, helped people in trouble, and devoted herself to doing good.
Nyoro: asimirwe abantu bona obwemirimo emirungi; araba yalezere abana, araba yakunire abagenyi, araba yanbisize abarukwera ebigere, araba yakonyire abobujune, araba yakuratire emirimo yona emirungi.

English: Then he said to the disciples, “The time will come when you will wish you could see one of the days of the Son of Man, but you will not see it.
Nyoro: Kandi akagambira abegeswa ati Ebiro biriija, ebimuliseru’ramu okukora ekiro ekimu hali ebiro Ebyomwana womuntu; timulikibona.

English: If we say that we have not sinned, we make a liar out of God, and his word is not in us.
Nyoro: Obutugamba ngu titukasisaga, tumufora omubihi webisuba, kandi ekigambokye tikiri omulitwe.

English: At that moment Zechariah was able to speak again, and he started praising God.
Nyoro: Bahuni’ra bona. Ahonaho akanwake kakaiguka, norulimirwe rukaboho’roka, yagamba nakugiza Ruhanga.

English: The Spirit is the guarantee that we shall receive what God has promised his people, and this assures us that God will give complete freedom to those who are his. Let us praise his glory!
Nyoro: kandi ogu nuwe mukwatirizo ogwobugwetwa bwaitu okuhikya Ruhanga abiyaguzire obubalikacungurwa, ekitinisakye nukwo kikugizibwe kiti.

English: The word of the Lord spread everywhere in that region.
Nyoro: Kandi ekigambo kya Mukama waitu kikahika omu nsi yona.

English: “But I am one by birth,” Paul answered.
Nyoro: Kandi engabwa enkuru yagamba ati Nyowe nkatunga Oburumi bunu nebintu bingi. Kandi Paulo yagamba ati Baitu nyowe nukwo nazairwe.

English: He trusts in God and claims to be God's Son. Well, then, let us see if God wants to save him now!”
Nyoro: Akesiga Ruhanga; amujune hati bunu, araba namugonza: baitu akagamba ati Ninyowe Mwana wa Ruhanga.

English: Just say ‘Yes’ or ‘No’—anything else you say comes from the Evil One.
Nyoro: Baitu ebigambo byanyu biikalege biti Ego, ego; nangwa, nangwa, baitu ebikira ebi nibyo biruga hali omubi.

English: They came to a place called Golgotha, which means, “The Place of the Skull.”
Nyoro: Obubatahire omu kiikaro ekyetwa Gologosa, amakuru gakyo ngu Kiikaro kyoruhanga,

English: Throughout our lives we are always in danger of death for Jesus' sake, in order that his life may be seen in this mortal body of ours.
Nyoro: Baitu itwe abomire tuhebwayo obutosa hali okufa habwa Yesu: nukwo obwomezi bwa Yesu bwolekwe omu mibiri yaitu eyokufa.

English: For the trouble of those days will be far worse than any the world has ever known from the very beginning when God created the world until the present time. Nor will there ever be anything like it again.
Nyoro: Baitu ebiro ebi biriba byobujune, ebitakabahoga biti Ruhanga akaba okuhanga ebyahangirwe, na hati hona, kandi tibiribaho.

English: It was then almost noon of the day before the Passover. Pilate said to the people, “Here is your king!”
Nyoro: Kikaba liri kiro kya Kutekaniza Okuhingurwaho: zikaba ziri nkesaha omukaga. Yagambira Abayudaya ati Dora, Omukama wanyu!

English: May the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all.
Nyoro: Embabazi za Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo ziikale nainywe inywena.

English: In the same way Moses also sprinkled the blood on the Sacred Tent and over all the things used in worship.
Nyoro: Kandi nehema nebintu byona ebyokuhererezamu nukwo yabimisireho ati esagama.

English: Simon Peter answered, “Lord, do not wash only my feet, then! Wash my hands and head, too!”
Nyoro: Simoni Petero yamugambira ati Mukama wange, tibiri bigere byange byonka, rundi nemikono nomutwe.

English: And it was not Adam who was deceived; it was the woman who was deceived and broke God's law.
Nyoro: tali Adamu nuwe yabandize okuhangwa, hanyumabwe, baitu omukazi oli nuwe yabihibwe, yagwa omu kusisa.

English: What did you go out to see? A man dressed up in fancy clothes? People who dress like that live in palaces!
Nyoro: baitu mukagenderayo ki omu irungu okurra? Omuntu ajwaire ebisemire? Dora abajwaire ebisemire bali omu maju gabakama.

English: There will be blood, fire, and thick smoke;
Nyoro: Esagama nomu'ro nokucuka kwomuika:

English: So Jesus said to them, “I tell you: the tax collectors and the prostitutes are going into the Kingdom of God ahead of you.
Nyoro: Hali abo ababiri noha yakozire ise ekiyagondeze? Bamugambira ngu Owokubanza. Yesu yabagambira ati mananukwo nimbagambira nti Abahoza nabasihani nibabanza inywe okutaha omu bukama bwa Ruhanga.

English: neither the world above nor the world below—there is nothing in all creation that will ever be able to separate us from the love of God which is ours through Christ Jesus our Lord.
Nyoro: nobukwakuba okuraiha, nobukwakuba okuhama, nobukyakuba ekihangirwe kyona ekindi, tibirisobora okubaganiza itwe omu kugonza kwa Ruhanga okuli omu Kristo Yesu Mukama waitu.

English: For God has made all people prisoners of disobedience, so that he might show mercy to them all.
Nyoro: Baitu Ruhanga okaboha bona omu kutahu’ra, agaruke aganyire bona.

English: But Peter and John answered them, “You yourselves judge which is right in God's sight—to obey you or to obey God.
Nyoro: Baitu Petero na Yohana bagarukamu nibabagambira ngu Obukiraba kiri kirungi,omu maiso ga Ruhanga okuhu'ra inywe okukira Ruhanga mutekereze:

English: They have tails and stings like those of a scorpion, and it is with their tails that they have the power to hurt people for five months.
Nyoro: Kandi zikaba ziyina emikara erukusisana nkenge ezobusegwe nemibuli, kandi omu mikira yazo harumu obusobozi bwazo okurumira abantu amezi atano.

English: But Jesus refused to answer a single word, with the result that the Governor was greatly surprised.
Nyoro: Baitu atagarukemu kigambo na kimu: nukwo nomulemi yahuni’ra muno.

English: Jesus sternly ordered the evil spirits not to tell anyone who he was.
Nyoro: Yagitere’ra muno ereke okumumanyisa abantu.

English: Everything is pure to those who are themselves pure; but nothing is pure to those who are defiled and unbelieving, for their minds and consciences have been defiled.
Nyoro: zima.hali abasemire byona bisemire; hali abasisikaire nabatarukuikiriza busaho ekisemire; baitu namagezi gabu nomutima gwabu bisisikaire.

English: In the same way, all of us, whether Jews or Gentiles, whether slaves or free, have been baptized into the one body by the same Spirit, and we have all been given the one Spirit to drink.
Nyoro: Baitu itwe itwena omu Mwoyo gumu tukabatizibwa okutaha omu mubiri gumu, rundi Abayudaya, rundi Abayonani, rundi abairu, rundi abobugabe; kandi itwena tukanywisibwa Omwoyo gumu.

English: Of course such rules appear to be based on wisdom in their forced worship of angels, and false humility, and severe treatment of the body; but they have no real value in controlling physical passions.
Nyoro: ebi nibisisana mali okuba namagezi omu kuramya omuntu okwaramize wenka, baitu tibinyina mugaso na kake okutanga okwegomba okwomubiri.

English: Jesus turned and rebuked them.
Nyoro: Baitu yahinduka, yabahana [nagamba ati Timurukumanya mutima okuguli ogumunyinagwo. Baitu Omwana womuntu ataije okuhwerekereza obwomezi bwabantu, baitu okubujuna.]

English: Pray that I may be kept safe from the unbelievers in Judea and that my service in Jerusalem may be acceptable to God's people there.
Nyoro: nukwo njunwe hali abo abatarukuhu’ra abomu Buyudaya, kandi okuhereza kwange okurukuntwara Yerusalemu kusimwe abarukwera;

English: Jesus healed many who were sick with all kinds of diseases and drove out many demons. He would not let the demons say anything, because they knew who he was.
Nyoro: Yakiza baingi abakaba barwaire endwara ezindi nezindi, nabinga emizimu mingi: kandi ataikirize mizimu okugamba, baitu ekamumanya.

English: The angel came to her and said, “Peace be with you! The Lord is with you and has greatly blessed you!”
Nyoro: Kandi akataha omwe, yamugambira ati Mirembe, iwe anyakuhairwe muno omugisa, Mukama (ali) naiwe.

English: Work hard and do not be lazy. Serve the Lord with a heart full of devotion.
Nyoro: omu kwekamba mutaba bagara; mutagate omu mwoyo; muko’re Mukama;

English: So then, we must always aim
Nyoro: Nukwo tuhonderege ebyobusinge, nebyokwekambisangana.

English: Even handkerchiefs and aprons he had used were taken to the sick, and their diseases were driven away, and the evil spirits would go out of them.
Nyoro: nabarwaire baleterwa ebikoba nengoye ebyarugure ha mubirigwe, kandi endwara zabakiraho, nemizimu emibi yabarugaho.

English: The servant who had received five thousand coins went at once and invested his money and earned another five thousand.
Nyoro: Ahonaho ogu owuyahairwe etaranta itano akagenga, yazigobamu etaranta itano ezindi.

English: When he found him, he took him to Antioch, and for a whole year the two met with the people of the church and taught a large group. It was at Antioch that the believers were first called Christians.
Nyoro: Kandi kyahika, bakahikya omwaka gumu, nebesoroza hamu nabekanisa, nibegesa abantu baingi; kandi abegesebwa bakabandiza Antyokiya okwetwa Abakristayo.

English: Philip and Bartholomew; Thomas and Matthew, the tax collector; James son of Alphaeus, and Thaddaeus;
Nyoro: Firipo na Batolomayo; Tomasi na Matayo omuzinisa; Yakobo omwana wa Alifayo, na Sadayo;

English: Paul greeted them and gave a complete report of everything that God had done among the Gentiles through his work.
Nyoro: Obuyamazire okubaramukya, yabagambira kimukimu Ruhanga ebiyakozire hali Abamahanga omu kuherezakwe.

English: It is clear that Christ himself wrote this letter and sent it by us. It is written, not with ink but with the Spirit of the living God, and not on stone tablets but on human hearts.
Nyoro: kandi mwolekerwe muli baruha ya Kristo, itwe eyitwaherize, etarahandikirwe nabwino, baitu Nomwoyo ogwa Ruhanga omwomezi, hatali ha mabale kwonka, baitu ha mabale agemitima yomubiri.

English: Those who do not carry their own cross and come after me cannot be my disciples.
Nyoro: Wena atahimba mutigwe wenka naija enyuma yange, tasobora kuba mwegeswa wange.

English: He who comes from God listens to God's words. You, however, are not from God, and that is why you will not listen.”
Nyoro: Owa Ruhanga ahu’ra ebigambo bya Ruhanga: nikyo mutarukuhuli’ra baitu timuli ba ruhanga.

English: and come out of their graves: those who have done good will rise and live, and those who have done evil will rise and be condemned.
Nyoro: akabalihuli’ramu iralalye, kandi balirugamu; abo abakozire okurungi hali okuhumbuka okwobwomezi; nabo abakozire okubi hali okuhumbuka okwobwomezi; nabo abakozire okubi hali okuhumbuka okwomusango.

English: “Once there was a man who went out to sow grain.
Nyoro: Yabaza nabo bingi omu nfumo, nagamba ati Dora, omusigi akatura okusiga;

English: and said to him, “Everyone else serves the best wine first, and after the guests have drunk a lot, he serves the ordinary wine. But you have kept the best wine until now!”
Nyoro: Namugambira ati Abantu bona babanza okutaho amarwa amarungi: kandi abantu obubaiguta, bagaruka nibataho agabihire: iwe oyahuire amarungi okuhika hati bunu.

English: The women were Mary Magdalene, Joanna, and Mary the mother of James; they and the other women with them told these things to the apostles.
Nyoro: Nibo Malyamu Magasalene, na Yoana, na Malyamu nyina Yakobo: nabakazi abandi abakaba balinabo, bakatebeza abakwenda ebigambo ebi.

English: “If your brother sins, rebuke him, and if he repents, forgive him.
Nyoro: Mwerinde inywenka: mugenzi wawe obwaraba nasisa, omuhnege; obwaraba nayegarukamu, omuganyirege.

English: “Why are you amazed?” the angel asked me. “I will tell you the secret meaning of the woman and of the beast that carries her, the beast with seven heads and ten horns.
Nyoro: Maraika yangambira ati Kiki ekirukukutangaza? nyowe ndakutebeza ekyensita ekyomukazi, nekisoro ekyatembere, ekinyina emitwe musanju namahembe ikumi.

English: A married woman, for example, is bound by the law to her husband as long as he lives; but if he dies, then she is free from the law that bound her to him.
Nyoro: Baitu omukazi anyakuswirwe iba, alemwa iba akyali mwomezi; baitu omusaija obwafa, buli alekirwe omu biragiro bya iba.

English: And as for us—why would we run the risk of danger every hour?
Nyoro: Kandi naitwe ntuika’ra ki omu kabi ebiro byona?

English: For God will not show mercy when he judges the person who has not been merciful; but mercy triumphs over judgment.
Nyoro: Baitu omusango tiguli gwakuganyira hali ogu atarukuganyira hali ogu atarukuganyira, okuganyira nukukyanganuka okusingura musango.

English: There were some shepherds in that part of the country who were spending the night in the fields, taking care of their flocks.
Nyoro: Kandi omusni egi hakaba harumu abalisa abaikaire omu bwe’re nibalinda igana lyabu ekiro.

English: When one of the servant women saw him sitting there at the fire, she looked straight at him and said, “This man too was with Jesus!”
Nyoro: Kandi omuisiki omu obuyamuboine aikalire nambere omu’ro gwakire, yamugumiza amaiso, nagamba ati Nonu abaire ali nauwe.

English: But those who want to get rich fall into temptation and are caught in the trap of many foolish and harmful desires, which pull them down to ruin and destruction.
Nyoro: Baitu abanyakugonza okutunga itungo bagwa omu kwohebwa nendubatira nokwegomba kwingi okwobutami okwakabi okurukusisa, okuibika abantu omu kubura nokuhwereke’ra.

English: And with all his abundant wealth through Christ Jesus, my God will supply all your needs.
Nyoro: Kandi Ruhanga wange alihikiriza byona ebimutaga, nkobugudabwe okubuli omu kitinisa omu Kristo Yesu.

English: Repent, then, of this evil plan of yours, and pray to the Lord that he will forgive you for thinking such a thing as this.
Nyoro: Nukwo oyegarukemu obubi bwawe obu, osabe Mukama waitu rundi oliganyirwa obwekitekerezo ekyomu mutima gwawe.

English: They will fight against the Lamb; but the Lamb, together with his called, chosen, and faithful followers, will defeat them, because he is Lord of lords and King of kings.”
Nyoro: Banu balirwana Nomwana Gwentama, kandi Omwana Gwentama alibasingura, baitu nuwe Mulemi wabanyoro., kandi Omukama wabakama; nabo abali hamu nauwe balisingura, nibo bayeserwe, abakomerwemu, abokwesiga.

English: But they insisted even more strongly, “With his teaching he is starting a riot among the people all through Judea. He began in Galilee and now has come here.”
Nyoro: Baitu bagarukira muno okugamba ngu Ayemeseze abantu, nayegesa omu Buyudaya bwona, akabandiza Galiraya okuhika na hanu.

English: Even though he had performed all these miracles in their presence, they did not believe in him,
Nyoro: Baitu nobwaraba yakozire obwokuro’raho bwingi obuingaine aho omu maiso gabu, batamuikirize:

English: On the Sabbath he began to teach in the synagogue. Many people were there; and when they heard him, they were all amazed. “Where did he get all this?” they asked. “What wisdom is this that has been given him? How does he perform miracles?
Nyoro: Kandi sabiti obuyahikire, yabanza okwegesa omu iso’rokaniro: abaingi obubamuhulire bahuni’ra, nibagamba ngu Onu akaiha nkaha ebigambo ebi? kandi ngu Magezi ki ganu onu agayahairwe? Nebyamani ebirukuingana aho ebikozirwe omu mikonoye?

English: Whoever hates me hates my Father also.
Nyoro: Anyakunoba nyowe, anoba na Isenyowe.

English: Soon the servant said, ‘Your order has been carried out, sir, but there is room for more.’
Nyoro: Kandi omuiru rubale yagamba ati Mukama wange ekyoragirege bakikozire, kandi hakiroho omwanya.

English: At last he came to his senses and said, ‘All my father's hired workers have more than they can eat, and here I am about to starve!
Nyoro: Baituobuyayegarukiremu yagamba ati Abairu baingaha abakolereza empera aba isenyowe abaiguta ebyokulya nibibalema, kunu nyowe ninfera hanu enjara?

English: and they will proclaim my message.
Nyoro: Ndibasesera ha Mwoyo gwange, baliragura.

Nyoro: Yesu yamugambira ati Nakaba kuikaraho nainywe, ebiro bingi biti, kandi tokamanyaga nyowe Firipo? Anyakundozire nyowe, buli arizire Isenyowe. kiki ekirukugambisa iwe ngu Twoleke Isitwe.

English: If there had been nothing wrong with the first covenant, there would have been no need for a second one.
Nyoro: Baitu ekiragano eki ekyokubanza kuba kitaloho ekyokukunganira, tihakuseruirwe omwanya ogwekyakabiri.

English: God called you to this through the Good News we preached to you; he called you to possess your share of the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.
Nyoro: Ebiyabetire inywe omu njiri yaitu, obwokutunga ekitinisa kya Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo.

English: For it is not ourselves that we preach; we preach Jesus Christ as Lord, and ourselves as your servants for Jesus' sake.
Nyoro: Baitu titurukwetebeza itwenka, rundi Kristo Yesu Mukama waitu, kandi itwe ngu tulibairu banyu habwa Yesu.

English: Aram was the father of Amminadab. Amminadab was the father of Nahshon. Nahshon was the father of Salmon.
Nyoro: Ramu akazara Aminadabu; Amidabu akazara Nasoni; Nasoni akazara Sarumoni;

English: But many who are now first will be last, and many who are now last will be first.”
Nyoro: obwomezi obutahwaho. Baitu baingi abokubanza abaliba abenyuma; nabenyuma abaliba abokubanza.

English: But God raised him from death,
Nyoro: Baitu Ruhanga akamuhumbura omubafu:

English: For anyone who wishes them peace becomes their partner in the evil things they do.
Nyoro: baitu anyakumuramukya buli ateraine omu ngesoze ezibihire.

English: Everything that God has created is good; nothing is to be rejected, but everything is to be received with a prayer of thanks,
Nyoro: Baitu ekihangirwe kyona ekya Ruhanga kirungi, kunu busaho kyokunaga obukihabwa nokusima:

English: and asked, “What will you give me if I betray Jesus to you?” They counted out thirty silver coins and gave them to him.
Nyoro: Nimuikiriza okumpa ki, nanyowe ndamuhayo nambere muli? Bamulengera ebicwaka ebyefeza amakumi asatu.

English: Then I was told, “Once again you must proclaim God's message about many nations, races, languages, and kings.”
Nyoro: Kandi bakangambira ngu Kikuhikirire okugaruka okuragura hali abantu, namahanga, nendimi, nabakama baingi.

English: He preached about the Kingdom of God and taught about the Lord Jesus Christ, speaking with all boldness and freedom.
Nyoro: natebeza xobukama bwa Ruhanga, nayegesa ebigambo bya Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo nobumanzi bwona, atatangwe omuntu wena.

English: So they went out and preached that people should turn away from their sins.
Nyoro: Kandi bakagenda nibatebeza okwegarukamu.

English: There is a real opportunity here for great and worthwhile work, even though there are many opponents.
Nyoro: baitu oruigi orukoto orwamani runkingukireho, kandi abarukuntanga baingi.

English: As for you, even the hairs of your head have all been counted.
Nyoro: baitu nisoke erya ha mutwe gwawe libazirwe lyona.

English: While I was with them, I kept them safe by the power of your name, the name you gave me.
Nyoro: Obunkabandi nabo, nyowe nkabalinda omu ibara lyawe abawampaire: nimbasemba tihakaburaga muntu hali bo, rundi omwana owokuhwereke’ra; ebyahandikirwe bihiki’re.

English: Many of them were saying, “He has a demon! He is crazy! Why do you listen to him?”
Nyoro: Baingi halibo nibagamba ngu Aloho muzimu, agwire iraro; mumuhuli’ra ki?

English: and Christ will shine on you.”
Nyoro: Nikyo agambirw ati Sisimuka iwe agwijagire, kandi ohumbuke omu bafu, kandi Kristo arukumulikira.

English: My friends, each of you should remain in fellowship with God in the same condition that you were when you were called.
Nyoro: Bene baitu, omuntu wena omu kwetwa okuyayetirwemu, nuho aikalege hamu na Ruhanga.

English: Thomas (called the Twin) said to his fellow disciples, “Let us all go along with the Teacher, so that we may die with him!”
Nyoro: Kandi Tomasi, ayetwa Didumo, yagambira abegeswa batahibe ati Naitwe tugende, tufere hamu nauwe.

English: But the man who had been healed did not know who Jesus was, for there was a crowd in that place, and Jesus had slipped away.
Nyoro: baitu ogu ayakizire atamanye okwali: baitu Yesu akaba ayegendire, baitu abantu abakaba baloho omu kiikaro eki baingi.

English: Yet when he received the news that Lazarus was sick, he stayed where he was for two more days.
Nyoro: Nukwo, obuyahulire ngu arwaire, yayosa ebiro bibiri omu kiikaro hakabali.

English: At all times carry faith as a shield; for with it you will be able to put out all the burning arrows shot by the Evil One.
Nyoro: nokukira byona mukwasire engabo eyokuikiriza,niyo eribasoboza okuraza emisogiyona eyomu`ro eyomubi.

English: They all were filled with fear and praised God. “A great prophet has appeared among us!” they said; “God has come to save his people!”
Nyoro: Okutina kwabakwata bona: bakugiza Ruhanga nibagamba ngu Nabi mukuru aimukire omulitwe: kandi ngu Ruhanga abungire abantube.

English: After saying this, Paul took some bread, gave thanks to God before them all, broke it, and began to eat.
Nyoro: Oboyagambire ati yakwata omugati, nasima Ruhanga omu maiso ga bona: yagucwamu nabanza okulya.

English: Every athlete in training submits to strict discipline, in order to be crowned with a wreath that will not last; but we do it for one that will last forever.
Nyoro: Kandi ogu anyakwekamba ayetanga omu byona. Kandi abo bakora bahabwe ekondo erukuhoka, baitu itwe ekondo etarukuhotoka.

English: Human anger does not achieve God's righteous purpose.
Nyoro: baitu ekiniga ekyomuntu tikirukukora okuhiki'ra kwa Ruhanga.

English: Those who had seen it told the people what had happened to the man with the demons, and about the pigs.
Nyoro: Abakiboine babasobo’ra ebyamubaireho ogu akabaloho emizimu, kandi nebyempunu.

English: I begged your disciples to drive it out, but they couldn't.”
Nyoro: Kandi nyesengerizege abegeswa bawe okugubinga; tibasobora.

English: Many more believed because of his message,
Nyoro: Abandi baingi bamuikiriza habwebigambobye:

English: When Jesus heard this, he was surprised and said to the people following him, “I tell you, I have never found anyone in Israel with faith like this.
Nyoro: Kandi Yesu obuyahulire, yahuni’ra, yabagambira abakaba nibagenda nauwe ati Mazimakwo nimbagambira nti Tinkabonaga kuiziriza kwingi nka kunu, nobuhokuba omu Isareri.

English: The argument became so violent that the commander was afraid that Paul would be torn to pieces. So he ordered his soldiers to go down into the group, get Paul away from them, and take him into the fort.
Nyoro: Kandi obuhabaireho okukungana kwingi, engabwa enkuru obuyatinire rundi barataguratagura Paulo, yaragira abaserikale okusirimuka nokumuihamu hagati yabu namani, nokumuleta omu rukomero.

English: They are like children sitting in the marketplace. One group shouts to the other, ‘We played wedding music for you, but you wouldn't dance! We sang funeral songs, but you wouldn't cry!’
Nyoro: Nibasisana nkabana abaika’ra omu katale nibetangana bonka; abagamba ngu Tukabate’ra enyamulere, timwazina; tukatera empamo, timwa’ra.
